name: VirtualScroller
description: VirtualScroller is a performant approach to handle huge data efficiently.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier of the element.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style of the component.

props.name: class
props.description: Style class of the component.

props.name: items
props.description: An array of objects to display.

props.name: itemSize
props.description: The height/width of item according to orientation.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the scroll viewport.

props.name: scrollWidth
props.description: Width of the scroll viewport.

props.name: orientation
props.description: The orientation of scrollbar.

props.name: numToleratedItems
props.description: Determines how many additional elements to add to the DOM outside of the view. According to the scrolls made up and down, extra items are added in a certain algorithm in the form of multiples of this number.
props.default: half the number of items shown in the view.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay in scroll before new data is loaded.

props.name: resizeDelay
props.description: Delay after window's resize finishes.

props.name: lazy
props.description: Defines if data is loaded and interacted with in lazy manner.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If disabled, the VirtualScroller feature is eliminated and the content is displayed directly.

props.name: loaderDisabled
props.description: Used to implement a custom loader instead of using the loader feature in the VirtualScroller.

props.name: showLoader
props.description: Whether to show loader.

props.name: showSpacer
props.description: Used to implement a custom spacer instead of using the spacer feature in the VirtualScroller.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether to load items.

props.name: onLazyLoad
props.description: Callback to invoke in lazy mode to load new data.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: inline
props.description: When enabled, positions the content as inline.

props.name: step
props.description: Used to specify how many items to load in each load method in lazy mode.

props.name: appendOnly
props.description: Used to append each loaded item to top without removing any items from the DOM. Using very large data may cause the browser to crash.

props.name: autoSize
props.description: Whether to dynamically change the height or width of scrollable container.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: scroll
events.description: Callback to invoke when scroll position changes.

events.name: scroll-index-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when scroll position and item's range in view changes.

events.name: lazy-load
events.description: Callback to invoke in lazy mode to load new data.

slots.name: content
slots.type: (scope: { /** * An array of objects to display for virtualscroller */ items: any; /** * Style class of the content */ styleClass: string; /** * Referance of the content * @param {HTMLElement} el - Element of 'ref' property */ contentRef: (el: any) => void; /** * Options of the items * @param {number} index - Rendered index * @return {@link VirtualScrollerItemOptions} */ getItemOptions: (index: number) => VirtualScrollerItemOptions; /** * Whether the data is loaded. */ loading: boolean; /** * Loader options of the items while the data is loading. * @param {number} index - Rendered index * @param {*} [ext] - Extra options * @return {@link VirtualScrollerItemOptions} */ getLoaderOptions: (index: number, ext?: any) => VirtualScrollerLoaderOptions; /** * The height/width of item according to orientation. */ itemSize: number | number[] | undefined; /** * The number of the rendered rows. */ rows: number | undefined; /** * The number of the rendered columns. */ columns: number | undefined; /** * The style of spacer element. */ spacerStyle: any; /** * The style of content element. */ contentStyle: any; /** * Whether the orientation is vertical. */ vertical: boolean; /** * Whether the orientation is horizontal. */ horizontal: boolean; /** * Whether the orientation is both. */ both: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Item data. */ item: any; /** * Item options. */ options: VirtualScrollerItemOptions; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loadingicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
